sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: usually beats ultra-processed sweet snacks. that replacement value matters in real life. easy to use as a whole food. simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. ingredient simplicity is hard to argue with. whole-fruit clarity is part of the category appeal.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: can be easy to waste if timing is off. perishability is a practical downside people actually feel. easy to eat quickly when it is very sweet. that can blur the line between light and sugar-heavy portions. sugar can climb fast. a lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.
